name: Marriage betrayal — 14 turns
context: Wife discovered husband Mark's affair; deciding whether to stay. Living people: husband Mark, sister Rachel, two kids. Topic: marriage. No deaths.

turns.user: I found out my husband Mark has been having an affair. I'm shaking as I type this.
We've been married eleven years. We have two kids, 8 and 5.
He says it's over and he wants to fix things. I don't know if I believe him.
Part of me still loves him. Part of me wants to throw him out tonight.
I haven't told anyone except my sister Rachel. She says leave him immediately.
I keep wondering if I did something wrong. Was I just not enough for him?
How do I even look at him across the dinner table tonight?
I'm terrified of what a divorce would do to the kids.
Is it weak to want to forgive him? Everyone tells me I should be furious.
We used to pray together every night. I can't even do that now.
I think I need to talk to someone, but I'm so ashamed for anyone to know.
Okay. I need a plan. What do I actually do this week?
Should we try counseling, or is that pointless after this kind of betrayal?
What is one thing I can say to him when he gets home tonight?
